title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Petroleum

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Petroleum
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!
